title: Duplicate billing charge
description: Duplicate charge detected on customer account. Refund initiated via payments processor.

title: GDPR data retention audit
description: Compliance audit of data retention policies. Customer data purge schedule requires review.

title: Identity fraud investigation

title: Account reconciliation mismatch
description: Monthly account reconciliation detected $500 discrepancy. Audit trail reviewed.
